notes._source: Pages 5-11 Results sections for multiple lab panels (authorizing provider and performing organization text repeated)

patient_summary: Olivia is a 73-year-old female (DOB 05/05/1952). Visit diagnoses (06/30/2023) include Mixed dyslipidemia - Primary; Essential hypertension, benign; Leg pain; Postoperative anemia; Unspecified anemia. Key abnormal laboratory findings (07/03/2023): Ferritin 266.8 (H) ng/mL; Iron 41 (L) ug/dL; Iron Saturation 15 (L) %; eGFR CKD-EPI 58 (L) ml/min/1.73m2; Triglycerides 158 (H) mg/dL; VLDL Cholesterol Cal 32 (H) mg/dL; Chloride 108 (H) mmol/L; Anion Gap 5.0 (L) mmol/L. TSH Ultra Sensitive 1.320 mIU/mL and LDL Calculated 62 mg/dL are reported. Social history: former cigarette smoker (quit 1991), no current alcohol use. Primary care provider: Hand, Hoyet A, MD (PCP, Family Medicine, NPI 1225340599). Multiple upcoming follow-up appointments are scheduled in 2024 with primary care, rheumatology, cardiology, and gastroenterology per the plan.
